name: consultasia-express
description: ConsultAsia Express — fullstack SIA reporting system

scripts.dev: concurrently -n "api,ui" -c "blue,green" "npm --prefix backend run dev" "npm --prefix frontend run dev"
scripts.build: npm --prefix backend run build && npm --prefix frontend run build
scripts.start: concurrently -n "api,ui" -c "blue,green" "npm --prefix backend run start" "npm --prefix frontend run preview"
scripts.install:all: npm --prefix backend install && npm --prefix frontend install
